headline: PulteGroup Q2 Earnings Preview: What Investors Should Expect
summary: PHM's Q2 results are likely to reflect higher sequential closings and resilient demand, even as lower prices, incentives and margin pressure weigh on earnings.

headline: What Analyst Projections for Key Metrics Reveal About PulteGroup (PHM) Q2 Earnings
summary: Evaluate the expected performance of PulteGroup (PHM) for the quarter ended June 2026, looking beyond the conventional Wall Street top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining some of its key metrics for better insight.
